---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behaviour:

1. Run `aspire run`
2. Open the Admin dashboard at `https://localhost:7xxx`
3. Do X…
4. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages, stack traces, or unexpected output.

## Environment

| | |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14 |
| .NET version | `dotnet --version` |
| Aspire CLI version | `aspire --version` |
| Browser (if UI bug) | e.g. Chrome 125 |

## Logs / traces

Paste relevant log output here, or share the Aspire dashboard trace URL if you have one.

```
(paste here)
```

## Additional context

Any other context — config changes, recent PRs, related issues.
